title: Borderless Windowed
description: Enables a borderless windowed fullscreen mode, replacing Minecraft’s default fullscreen behavior.
body:
## Borderless Windowed

Borderless Windowed replaces Minecraft’s default fullscreen with a borderless windowed mode.

This allows Minecraft to behave like fullscreen while remaining a window, making it easier to alt-tab, use multiple monitors, and avoid screen flickering or resolution changes.

### Features
- Borderless windowed fullscreen
- Faster and smoother alt-tabbing
- No resolution switching
- Works like fullscreen without exclusive mode

### Compatibility
- Fabric mod
- Client-side only
- Compatible with most mods

### Notes
This mod does not change gameplay and only affects how the game window behaves.
